title: tectaria coadunata var. gemmifera
intro: Tectaria coadunata var. gemmifera, also known as the fern plant, is a species of plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tectaria coadunata var. gemmifera are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and protect against certain diseases. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for its medicinal uses, and it can also be used as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form.
